zh.lifeSummary: 當William Welles於1410年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Eude Welles23歲，母親Maud Greystoke23歲。他和Anne Barnewall至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1481年3月29日在英國越可爾堂頓享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Welles于1410年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Eude Welles23岁，母亲Maud Greystoke23岁。他和Anne Barnewall至少有4个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1481年3月29日在英国越可爾堂頓享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Welles was born in 1410, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Eude Welles, was 23 and his mother, Maud Greystoke, was 23. He had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Anne Barnewall. He died on 29 March 1481, in Towton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Welles est né en 1410, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Eude Welles, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Maud Greystoke, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Anne Barnewall. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1481, à Towton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Welles 1410 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eude Welles 23 und seine Mutter Maud Greystoke 23. Er hatte mit Anne Barnewall mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 29. März 1481 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Towton, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Welles è nato il nel 1410 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Eude Welles, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Maud Greystoke, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con Anne Barnewall. Morì il 29 marzo 1481, nel Towton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Wellesが1410年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Eude Wellesは23歳，母Maud Greystokeは23歳であった。彼はAnne Barnewallとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1481年3月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアトウトンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Welles(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eude Welles(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Greystoke(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Anne Barnewall(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 3월 29일 영국 요르크실르 타우턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Welles nasceu em 1410, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Eude Welles, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Maud Greystoke, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com Anne Barnewall. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1481, em Towton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Welles родился в 1410 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Eude Welles было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Greystoke, 23. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Anne Barnewall. Он умер 29 марта 1481 г. в местности тоутон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Welles nació en 1410, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Eude Welles, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Maud Greystoke, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas con Anne Barnewall. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1481, en Towton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
